titleStmt.title: SII 9.132: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 132. (A.R. No. 103 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH-WEST SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 990, Kīlaka, Jyēshṭha, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1068 May 19, Monday, and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II). While his feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permāḍi Jayasiṅgadēva was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Kadambaḷige thousand and Ballakunde three-hundred a certain Mahadēvayya purchased for 52 gadyāṇas the quantity of lease produce that the Śūdras had to pay to cultivate the fields of Brāhmans and made a gift of it to the tank, fixing the price at the rate of paṇas 3 for a vīsa per annum. The Mahājanas made a gift of taxes on barbers to him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire svasti samastabhuvanastutamahāmahimōdayōlla
sitapallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ vidagdhaviḷāsiniviḷōcanacakō
racaṁdraṁ pratyakṣadēvēṁdraṁ vikrāntakaṇṭhīravaṁ maṇḍaḷikabhaira
vaṁ śaraṇāgatavrajapaṁjaraṁ cāḷukyadikkuṁjaraṁ vaṁdibaiṁdasaṁtarppaṇaṁ vija
yalakṣmīmukhadarppaṇaṁ rāyakumaracamatkāraṁ sāhasāḷaṁkāraṁ kīrtti
vallarīvaḷayitatriḷōkaṁ satyāvaḷōkaṁ rājavidyāṁganābhu
jaṁganaṇnanasiṁgaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamallanoḷaṁbapallavapermmā
ḍi jayasiṁgadēvarkōgaḷiyaynūṟuṁ kadaṁbaḷige sāsiramuṁ ballakuṁ
de mūnūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁdāḷuttamire © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇamaunuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇajapahōmasamādhiśīḷasaṁ
pannarssamastasāstravēdavēdāntadhyayanadhāraṇapārāvāratīraprā
ptamativiśēṣayaśa®patākāvibhāśitar śrīmannārāyaṇaśrīpā
dapadmasadārādhanakramasaṁpūrṇnacittarappa śīmadbāḷguḷiyū
roḍeyapramukhamahājanamaivadiṁbarumaśēṣaṁ neredirdu
© sakavariṣa 990 neya kīlakasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭada puṇname sōma
vāradaṁdu brāhmaṇavṛttiya sūdranāḷalu varṣaṁprati vīsake mūṟu
paṇavina teṟeya nābāyāge 52 gadyāṇa ponnavṛddhige
peṟaruṇutire toṇakaliya mahādēvayyanellāveḍe
yaluṁ sāmyamennade teṟeyaṁ koḷuvaṁtāgiyā ponnaṁ
koṭṭu māṟugoṇḍu piriyakeṟege dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi caṁdrā
rkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭubiṭṭaḍe mahājanaṁ mahādēvayyaṁge nāvidavāriyuṁ taḷaṁ
bigūliyumanāvakālamuṁ parihāraṁ māḍidariṁtī dharmmamanaivadiṁbaru pra
tipāḷisuvapratipāḷisidaḍe prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrameṁ
ba mahātīrtthaṁgaḷoḷsāyira kavileya sāsirvvarvēdapāragarggubheya
mukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷidāta vāraṇāsi gurukṣētraṁ prayāge
yoḷsāsira kavileyuṁ sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpā
thakanakkuṁ © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . di ḷ hastisiṁgaṁ hari
ṇeya rūhageyakkharāvaḷiyiṁdaṁ bareya daḍe puru
disaveḍelevo rēvaṇāryyanoḷeṁduṁ deṁṭaṇi nele
tthaka ninnaḷavo citrada karadoḷpaṁ kaṁṭṭhadoḷ bareva rēvana kaṁṭṭhakeḷe
ṇisi nōrppoḍeṁdēkaikaṁ . nākōjaṁ sivapādaśēkharaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
